## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run lint`

## Context hygiene

- [ ] Updated fixtures for scanner behavior changes.
- [ ] Findings include source-backed evidence and suggestions.
- [ ] No secrets, logs, caches, or local-only artifacts added.
